name: Cubari
description: Cubari is a website to read manga online that optimizes images and allows you to access content from multiple sources.
author: Jhoorodr

fields.name: remoteStorageUrl
fields.label: Raw JSON File URL (Optional)
fields.description: If you have a static JSON file hosted on Github containing your Cubari list, paste its RAW URL here. (e.g. https://raw.githubusercontent.com/your-account/...)

fields.name: rsHref
fields.label: RemoteStorage Base URL (Optional)
fields.description: If you sync your Cubari via 5apps, paste your base URL here. (e.g. https://storage.5apps.com/your-username/)

fields.name: rsToken
fields.label: RemoteStorage Access Token (Optional)
fields.description: The Bearer Token generated by 5apps to grant read access to your account. Get this token by accessing your RemoteStorage settings.
